name: raycast-github-gist-explorer
title: GitHub Gist Explorer
description: Search, browse, create, and locally index your GitHub gists in Raycast.
author: kivayan

commands.name: search-gists
commands.title: Search Gists
commands.subtitle: GitHub
commands.description: Search your GitHub gists from a local index

commands.name: refresh-gists
commands.title: Refresh Gists
commands.subtitle: GitHub
commands.description: Refresh and rebuild the local gist index

preferences.name: fetchFullTruncatedContent
preferences.title: Fetch Full Truncated File Content
preferences.label: Fetch full raw content for truncated gist files
preferences.description: When enabled, the indexer fetches full raw content for truncated gist files
